meta.focus_summary_text:
🔥 Weekly AP Quant Radar — Technical Focus List

[AP-Clock]:
• $PPC 174/180 (rem 6d)
[Earnings in 2W]:
• $AGX  ER in 1d  (2026-03-26)
• $CCL  ER in 2d  (2026-03-27)

[ 📉 BREAKDOWNS (Below 200-SMA) ]
• $CCL | RISK_OFF | EVENT+NEWS+DVG | -10.3% | Vol 0.7x | ER in 2d
• $B | RISK_OFF | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -14.7% | Vol 0.7x | Hexagon proposes distribution and listing of Octave Intelligence plc
• $UBER | RECOVERY_WATCH | NEWS+BD200 | -16.3% | Vol 0.5x | Uber and Rivian partner to deploy up to 50,000 fully autonomous robotaxis
• $CRDO | RISK_OFF | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -20.0% | Vol 0.6x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
• $APP | RISK_OFF | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -15.3% | Vol 0.6x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
• $NEM | RISK_OFF | NEWS+DVG+BD200 | -9.5% | Vol 0.7x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found
• $OKTA | RECOVERY_WATCH | NEWS+BD200 | -12.2% | Vol 1.1x | No qualifying 7-day earnings, rating, M&A, or regulatory catalyst found

[ 🚀 STRENGTH (Above 200-SMA) ]
• $AGX | WATCH | EVENT+NEWS+X200 | +43.4% | Vol 0.9x | ER in 1d

● Recovery Triggers (EMA21 reclaim):
  • OKTA > 78.85
  • UBER > 74.57
  • AGX hold > 449.60 (EMA21)

focus_view_model.news_headline: Carnival Corporation & plc to hold conference call on first quarter earnings
focus_view_model.news_summary: Carnival is scheduled to report first-quarter 2026 earnings on March 27, placing the stock in an immediate event window while its price structure remains below major trend levels.

logic_pillars.technical: Price is below SMA200, EMA55, and EMA21, with the nearest technical decision zone at EMA21 (26.52).
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 at 0.74 indicates muted participation into the event, so any post-earnings move may need confirmation.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The March 27 earnings release is the key near-term company-specific catalyst.

divergence.note: Buy rating remains constructive, but the price is still below SMA200 and below EMA21 ahead of earnings.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Primary: close reclaim EMA21 (26.52) | Secondary: close reclaim EMA55 (28.19) | Failure: rejection below EMA21 (26.52) | Next Action: monitor
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Carnival Corporation & plc to hold conference call on first quarter earnings · 8d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Argan to announce fourth quarter and fiscal year-end 2026 results on March 26
focus_view_model.news_summary: Argan is scheduled to report fourth-quarter and fiscal year-end 2026 results after the market close on March 26, making the EMA21 test a high-attention setup.

logic_pillars.technical: Despite the pullback below EMA21, AGX remains in an uptrend and still trades 43.4% above SMA200.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 of 0.92 is not elevated, suggesting investors are waiting for earnings confirmation.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The March 26 earnings release is the dominant short-term catalyst.

divergence.note: Price remains above SMA200 and the event risk aligns with a still-strong longer-term structure.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Primary: close reclaim EMA21 (449.60) | Secondary: hold EMA55 (413.34) | Failure: close lose EMA55 (413.34) | Next Action: monitor
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Argan to announce fourth quarter and fiscal year-end 2026 results on March 26 · 13d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Hexagon proposes distribution and listing of Octave Intelligence plc
focus_view_model.news_summary: Hexagon announced a proposed distribution and listing of Octave Intelligence plc on March 24, introducing a fresh corporate action catalyst while the stock remains in a downtrend.

logic_pillars.technical: The chart remains broken below EMA21, EMA55, and SMA200.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 at 0.72 shows the market has not yet validated the corporate action with strong buying volume.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The Octave Intelligence spin-off proposal is a genuine near-term company-specific catalyst.

divergence.note: Strong Buy rating and positive corporate-action catalyst conflict with a still-broken technical structure.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Primary: close reclaim EMA21 (42.61) | Secondary: close reclaim EMA55 (44.51) | Failure: rejection below EMA21 (42.61) | Next Action: monitor
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Hexagon proposes distribution and listing of Octave Intelligence plc · 1d · 1 src

focus_view_model.news_headline: Uber and Rivian partner to deploy up to 50,000 fully autonomous robotaxis
focus_view_model.news_summary: Uber announced a major autonomous-vehicle partnership with Rivian on March 19, but the stock still sits below SMA200 and only near EMA21.

logic_pillars.technical: Price is near EMA21 but remains well below SMA200, so the setup is still a recovery attempt inside a downtrend.
logic_pillars.volume_analysis: RVOL20 at 0.53 is very soft, which weakens the credibility of the rebound attempt.
logic_pillars.news_catalyst: The Rivian robotaxi deal is a fresh, material company-specific catalyst.

divergence.note: The catalyst is positive, but the chart has not yet confirmed a structural reversal.

focus_view_model.action_plan: Primary: close reclaim EMA21 (74.57) | Secondary: close reclaim EMA55 (77.08) | Failure: rejection below EMA21 (74.57) | Next Action: monitor
focus_view_model.news_blurb: Uber and Rivian partner to deploy up to 50,000 fully autonomous robotaxis · 6d · 2 src
